name: Grilled Portabella Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems and wipe caps clean with a damp paper towel.
2. Combine oil, vinegar, shallots and garlic in a bowl.
3. Place mushrooms on their backs, dark "gill" side up. Spoon the dressing over the gills.
4. Grill the mushrooms on the rack over hot coals, gill sides up, for 4 minutes. Slice and serve.
